title: Settings Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the settings family — site-level configuration values (regional, navigation, audit, retention, runtime configuration, three-form ProcoreCompanyId contract). Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). `ProcoreCompanyId = 5280` is configuration, not a secret. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §7, §11.
